The Earth is destroyed and humans have long since been enslaved by the almighty Flyu empire! Actually, that goes for most of the universe at this point.

Many humans are bought and sold as pets, and you're no different. In fact, you were bought as a pet and get to live under CD2 and HS8! Hooray! Two super cuties who are totally the ying to each other's yang!

And now you!... You're being used as fuel for an argument of the Flyu that own you... Yay...

TL;DR: They're blue. Da ba dee da ba di

Tips for chatting with

  • Be mad at him! How DARE he make your FAVORITE storm off!

  • Time skip and accidentally run into his cousin. Invite him over while CD2 watches in horror.

  • Gossip about HS8.

  • Y'know how we could get back at HS8..."

  • You didn't even actually notice they were fighting because your fingers are stuck in one of those finger trap fidgets! OH NO!

  • Eh, CD2 is your favorite anyway. Hopefully HS8 doesn't come back for awhile!

  • "Why do you two fight :c"

Changes to character:

Switch: CD2 isn't supposed to be codded as a switch, but in testing I found he was heavily into switching. Would dom and sub pretty consistently, going either way. Unironically, one of my more switch consistent bots. So I added in some language to make it more 'canon' if he switches and let frustrating.

Bad habits: IвҖҷve given him some bad habits since I had more tokens to work with.

New characters: I'm adding in a sneak peak of a character that'll have their own bot eventually.

New picture: Look, when trying to gen a solo pic of him this was the best I could get. The outfit is weird and the ear thing is... let's say alt flyu fashion for now? Just focus on the eye bags XD
